title: Monitoring System. To standardize the monitoring reports and facilitate
content: 16 submission thereof, the LMAs shall use the OFW Welfare Monitoring System (OWMS) as 17 the tool in submitting the quarterly monitoring reports and significant or critical incident 18 reports on the status and condition of the deployed seafarer. 19 20
